extern XOpenDisplay
extern XDisplayName
extern XCloseDisplay
extern XCreateSimpleWindow
extern XMapWindow
extern XRootWindow
extern XSelectInput
extern XFlush
extern XCreateGC
extern XSetForeground
extern XDrawLine
extern XDrawPoint
extern XNextEvent

extern printf
extern exit

%define StructureNotifyMask 131072
%define KeyPressMask 1
%define ButtonPressMask 4
%define MapNotify 19
%define KeyPress 2
%define ButtonPress 4
%define Expose 12
%define ConfigureNotify 22
%define CreateNotify 16
%define QWORD 8
%define DWORD 4
%define WORD 2
%define BYTE 1
%define LARGEUR 400
%define HAUTEUR 400
%define POINTS 433
%define FACES 756

global main

section .bss
display_name: resq 1
screen: resd 1
depth: resd 1
connection: resd 1
width: resd 1
height: resd 1
window: resq 1
gc: resq 1
cosinus: resd 360
sinus: resd 360
X_prjt: resd POINTS
Y_prjt: resd POINTS
objet_rotated: resd POINTS * 3
cos_x: resd 1
sin_x: resd 1
cos_y: resd 1
sin_y: resd 1
cos_z: resd 1
sin_z: resd 1

section .data
event: times 24 dq 0
x1: dd 0
x2: dd 0
y1: dd 0
y2: dd 0
angle: dd 0
demiangle: dd 180
df: dd 400.0
Zoff: dd 300.0
Xoff: dd 200.0
Yoff: dd 200.0

angle_x: dd 0.0
angle_y: dd 0.0  
angle_z: dd 0.0
temp_x: dd 0.0
temp_y: dd 0.0
temp_z: dd 0.0

objet:

dd 51.0696295413,-100.0,-42.8525073124
dd 76.6044443119,-100.0,-64.2787609687
dd 76.6044443119,-100.0,-64.2787609687
dd 67.0288887729,-75.0,-56.2439158476
dd 57.4533332339,-50.0,-48.2090707265
dd 47.8777776949,-25.0,-40.1742256054
dd 38.3022221559,0.0,-32.1393804843
dd 28.726666617,25.0,-24.1045353632
dd 19.151111078,50.0,-16.0696902422
dd 9.57555553899,75.0,-8.03484512108
dd 0.0,100.0,-0.0
dd 28.8675134595,-100.0,-16.6666666667
dd 57.735026919,-100.0,-33.3333333333
dd 86.6025403784,-100.0,-50.0
dd 86.6025403784,-100.0,-50.0
dd 75.7772228311,-75.0,-43.75
dd 64.9519052838,-50.0,-37.5
dd 54.1265877365,-25.0,-31.25
dd 43.3012701892,0.0,-25.0
dd 32.4759526419,25.0,-18.75
dd 21.6506350946,50.0,-12.5
dd 10.8253175473,75.0,-6.25
dd 0.0,100.0,-0.0
dd 31.3230873595,-100.0,-11.4006714442
dd 62.6461747191,-100.0,-22.8013428884
dd 93.9692620786,-100.0,-34.2020143326
dd 93.9692620786,-100.0,-34.2020143326
dd 82.2231043188,-75.0,-29.926762541
dd 70.4769465589,-50.0,-25.6515107494
dd 58.7307887991,-25.0,-21.3762589579
dd 46.9846310393,0.0,-17.1010071663
dd 35.2384732795,25.0,-12.8257553747
dd 23.4923155196,50.0,-8.55050358314
dd 11.7461577598,75.0,-4.27525179157
dd 0.0,100.0,-0.0

dd 0.0,100.0,-0.0

dd 416,429,428
dd 417,430,429
dd 418,431,430
dd 419,432,431
dd 421,2,1
dd 422,3,2
dd 424,5,4
dd 425,6,5
dd 426,7,6
dd 427,8,7
dd 428,9,8
dd 429,10,9
dd 430,11,10
dd 431,12,11

compteur: dd 0

section .text

precalculer_angles_rotation:
    push rbp
    
    fld dword[angle_x]
    fldpi
    fmulp
    fidiv dword[demiangle]
    fsincos
    fstp dword[cos_x]
    fstp dword[sin_x]
    
    fld dword[angle_y]
    fldpi
    fmulp
    fidiv dword[demiangle]
    fsincos
    fstp dword[cos_y]
    fstp dword[sin_y]
    
    fld dword[angle_z]
    fldpi
    fmulp
    fidiv dword[demiangle]
    fsincos
    fstp dword[cos_z]
    fstp dword[sin_z]
    
    pop rbp
    ret

appliquer_rotations:
    push rbp
    mov rbp, rsp
    
    mov rsi, objet
    mov rdi, objet_rotated
    mov ecx, POINTS * 3
    cld
    rep movsd
    
    mov rax, objet_rotated
    mov dword[compteur], 0
    
.boucle_points:
    cmp dword[compteur], POINTS
    je .fin_rotations
    
    movss xmm0, [rax]
    movss xmm1, [rax+4]
    movss xmm2, [rax+8]
    
    movss [temp_y], xmm1
    movss [temp_z], xmm2
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_y]
    mulss xmm3, [cos_x]
    movss xmm4, [temp_z]
    mulss xmm4, [sin_x]
    subss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm1, xmm3
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_y]
    mulss xmm3, [sin_x]
    movss xmm4, [temp_z]
    mulss xmm4, [cos_x]
    addss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm2, xmm3
    
    movss [temp_x], xmm0
    movss [temp_z], xmm2
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_z]
    mulss xmm3, [sin_y]
    movss xmm4, [temp_x]
    mulss xmm4, [cos_y]
    addss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm0, xmm3
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_z]
    mulss xmm3, [cos_y]
    movss xmm4, [temp_x]
    mulss xmm4, [sin_y]
    subss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm2, xmm3
    
    movss [temp_x], xmm0
    movss [temp_y], xmm1
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_x]
    mulss xmm3, [cos_z]
    movss xmm4, [temp_y]
    mulss xmm4, [sin_z]
    subss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm0, xmm3
    
    movss xmm3, [temp_x]
    mulss xmm3, [sin_z]
    movss xmm4, [temp_y]
    mulss xmm4, [cos_z]
    addss xmm3, xmm4
    movss xmm1, xmm3
    
    movss [rax], xmm0
    movss [rax+4], xmm1
    movss [rax+8], xmm2
    
    add rax, 12
    inc dword[compteur]
    jmp .boucle_points
    
.fin_rotations:
    pop rbp
    ret

projeter:
    push rbp
    mov rbp, rsp
    mov rax, objet_rotated
    mov rbx, X_prjt
    mov rcx, Y_prjt
    mov dword[compteur], 0

.boucle:
    cmp dword[compteur], POINTS
    je fin_projeter

    movss xmm0, [rax + 0]
    movss xmm1, [rax + 4]
    movss xmm2, [rax + 8]

    addss xmm2, [Zoff]

    mulss xmm0, [df]
    mulss xmm1, [df]

    divss xmm0, xmm2
    divss xmm1, xmm2

    addss xmm0, [Xoff]
    addss xmm1, [Yoff]

    cvttss2si edx, xmm0
    mov [rbx], edx

    cvttss2si edx, xmm1
    mov [rcx], edx

    add rax, 12
    add rbx, 4
    add rcx, 4
    inc dword[compteur]

    jmp .boucle

fin_projeter:
    mov dword[compteur], 0
    pop rbp
    ret

calcul_normal_face:
    push rbp

    mov eax, [r14]
    mov ebx, [r14+4]
    mov ecx, [r14+8]

    mov esi, ebx
    imul esi, 4
    mov edi, [r12 + rsi]

    mov r8d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov esi, eax
    imul esi, 4
    mov edx, [r12 + rsi]
    sub edx, edi

    mov esi, eax
    imul esi, 4
    mov r9d, [r13 + rsi]
    sub r9d, r8d

    mov esi, ecx
    imul esi, 4
    mov r10d, [r12 + rsi]
    sub r10d, edi

    mov r11d, [r13 + rsi]
    sub r11d, r8d

    mov eax, edx
    imul eax, r11d

    mov ebx, r9d
    imul ebx, r10d

    sub eax, ebx

    cmp eax, 0
    jge .face_cachee

    mov rdx, 1
    jmp .fin_calcul

.face_cachee:
    mov rdx, 0

.fin_calcul:
    pop rbp
    ret

dessiner:
    push rbp

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[gc]
    mov edx, 0xFFFFFF
    call XSetForeground

    mov r14, faces
    mov r12, X_prjt
    mov r13, Y_prjt
    mov dword[compteur], 0

boucle_2:
    cmp dword[compteur], FACES
    je fin_dessiner

    call calcul_normal_face
    cmp rdx, 0
    je skip_face

    mov eax, [r14]
    mov ebx, [r14+4]
    mov r15d, [r14+8]

    push rax

    mov esi, eax
    imul esi, 4
    mov ecx, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r8d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov esi, ebx
    imul esi, 4
    mov r9d, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r10d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    mov rdx, qword[gc]
    push r10
    call XDrawLine
    add rsp, 8

    mov esi, ebx
    imul esi, 4
    mov ecx, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r8d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov esi, r15d
    imul esi, 4
    mov r9d, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r10d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    mov rdx, qword[gc]
    push r10
    call XDrawLine
    add rsp, 8

    pop rax
    mov esi, r15d
    imul esi, 4
    mov ecx, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r8d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov esi, eax
    imul esi, 4
    mov r9d, [r12 + rsi]
    mov r10d, [r13 + rsi]

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    mov rdx, qword[gc]
    push r10
    call XDrawLine
    add rsp, 8

skip_face:
    add r14, 12
    inc dword[compteur]
    jmp boucle_2

fin_dessiner:
    mov dword[compteur], 0
    pop rbp
    ret

main:    
    call precalculer_angles_rotation
    call appliquer_rotations
    
    push rbp
    mov rbp, rsp

    xor rdi, rdi
    call XDisplayName

    test rax, rax
    jz closeDisplay

    xor rdi, rdi
    call XOpenDisplay
    test rax, rax
    jz closeDisplay

    mov [display_name], rax

    mov rsp, rbp
    pop rbp

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov dword[screen], 0
    mov esi, dword[screen]
    call XRootWindow
    mov rbx, rax

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, rbx
    mov rdx, 10
    mov rcx, 10
    mov r8, LARGEUR
    mov r9, HAUTEUR
    push 0x000000
    push 0x000000
    push 1
    call XCreateSimpleWindow
    mov qword[window], rax

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    mov rdx, 131077
    call XSelectInput

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    call XMapWindow

    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    test rdi, rdi
    jz closeDisplay
    mov rsi, qword[window]
    test rsi, rsi
    jz closeDisplay
    xor rdx, rdx
    xor rcx, rcx
    call XCreateGC
    test rax, rax
    jz closeDisplay
    mov qword[gc], rax

boucle:
    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    cmp rdi, 0
    je closeDisplay
    mov rsi, event
    call XNextEvent
    
    cmp dword[event], ConfigureNotify
    je dessin
    cmp dword[event], KeyPress
    je closeDisplay
    jmp boucle

dessin:
    call projeter
    call dessiner
    jmp flush

flush:
    mov rdi, qword[display_name]
    call XFlush
    jmp boucle

closeDisplay:
    mov rax, qword[display_name]
    mov rdi, rax
    call XCloseDisplay
    xor rdi, rdi
    call exit
